description: Caller clearly declines every proposal. Call Outcome not_interested, no visit.
transcript:
Agent: Hi Pooja, this is Priya from Brigade about the Hebbal project. Do you have a moment?
Caller: I already bought a flat last month. Not looking anymore.
Agent: Congratulations! Would you consider an investment unit?
Caller: No, I'm done with real estate for now.
Agent: Understood, thanks for your time.
Caller: Bye.

Call Outcome.subjective: Already purchased elsewhere; declined investment option too.
